prompt: give me a nicer way to browse my clipboard history on mac

assertions.check: session.json.suggestions has at least 2 entries (the space is smaller here; 2 is fine)
suggestions explicitly acknowledge this is mac-only or the tool is a mac app — no generic linux/apt suggestions pretending to be cross-platform
at least one suggestion names a real macOS clipboard manager (maccy, raycast, alfred clipboard, pastebot, copyclip, clipy, flycut, etc.)
suggestions or notes confirm whether the repo already has a clipboard manager installed (via tools/*) — not just list brand new options blindly
